name: insurance brokers processing 10–20 claims/month tool
description: For insurance brokers processing 10–20 claims/month, delays in claims processing cause client dissatisfaction. We monitor claims status and flag delays instead of manual tracking through phone calls and emails.
problem_solved: Delays in claims processing lead to client dissatisfaction and potential loss of business.
